name: developer-workflow
description: Developer workflow toolbox — on-demand skills for research, specification (write-spec, reverse-spec), multiexpert review, retroactive tests, code-quality finalize, mechanical /check, QA (test plans, acceptance), PR creation, autonomous drive-to-merge (CI monitor, review handler, re-request, poll), and issue-manager (backlog orchestrator: DAG-ordered sequential issue pipeline with board advancement). Exploratory QA without a spec is performed by calling the manual-tester agent directly. Platform-neutral; platform-specific engineers live in developer-workflow-kotlin and developer-workflow-swift.
